temporal_deltas.earliest_to_current: The sequence shows a static, barren environment. There is no evidence of growth, decay, or movement over the 5-day period. The biome appears to be a dormant or failed experimental setup.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. All registered specimens are absent or have undergone total senescence/decomposition, leaving only substrate.
anomalies: Presence of a soil moisture sensor in P1.
Presence of white, fragmented debris (likely crushed eggshells or mineral grit) in the foreground pot.
Total absence of the P3 scale anchor (white rabbit).
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. The biome is currently devoid of any living botanical specimens. The pots contain only soil and inert materials. The lack of change across the 5-day timeline suggests that the plants were either removed prior to the start of this sequence or have completely decomposed into the substrate. The environment is currently a 'dead' system.
